sentences.arabic: يَتَطَوَّرُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي هَذَا الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija se razvija veoma brzo u ovom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is developing very rapidly in this era.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ الْآلَاتُ الذَّكِيَّةُ بِتَحْلِيلِ الْبَيَانَاتِ الضَّخْمَةِ لِتَقْدِيمِ حُلُولٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pametne mašine analiziraju velike podatke kako bi pružile nova rješenja.
sentences.translationEn: Smart machines analyze big data to provide new solutions.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَفِيدُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ مِنَ الذَّكَاءِ الِاصْطِنَاعِيِّ لِتَشْخِيصِ الْأَمْرَاضِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari koriste vještačku inteligenciju za precizno dijagnosticiranje bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors benefit from artificial intelligence to diagnose diseases accurately.

sentences.arabic: سَيُغَيِّرُ هَذَا الِابْتِكَارُ مُسْتَقْبَلَ الْعَمَلِ فِي كُلِّ أَنْحَاءِ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Ova inovacija će promijeniti budućnost rada širom svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: This innovation will change the future of work all over the world.
